about.body: Local pywebview app through the real Python PM3 bridge. No demo hardware states are generated.
about.title: RFID Workflow
analysis.antennaMeta: uses the real hw tune path
analysis.noRealChip: No real chip read in this session yet.
analysis.positionCopy: Place the chip centered and move it slowly by a few millimeters.
analysis.subtitle: Only real PM3 read-only paths and the last real chip data read.
analysis.title: Analysis
antenna.body: Remove all transponders from the antenna.
antenna.error: Antenna check could not be completed.
antenna.title: Antenna check
backups.empty: No matching backups found in storage.
backups.subtitle: Backups are saved only after an actual chip read.
backups.title: Backups
bridgeMissing.body: Start this interface in the pywebview window. Without the Python bridge no PM3 states are shown.
bridgeMissing.title: Desktop bridge unavailable
connection.noDeviceReconnect: No Proxmark3 detected. Connect the PM3 and check again.
field.name: Name
help.antennaFails.body: Remove every transponder, keep the PM3 connected, then run the antenna check again. If it still fails, check the Proxmark3 client installation and USB connection.
help.antennaFails.title: Antenna check fails
help.notDetected.body: Reconnect the Proxmark3, verify the local PM3/ProxSpace installation, then run the startup check again. The app does not flash firmware.
help.notDetected.title: Proxmark3 is not detected
help.readFails.body: Place the transponder flat and centered, avoid stacking tags, then retry reading. Use the position check when the signal remains unstable.
help.readFails.title: The transponder is not read
help.saveFails.body: A template can only be saved after two matching reads. Check that the second scan is verified and choose a non-empty name.
help.saveFails.title: A template cannot be saved
help.signalUnstable.body: Move the transponder in small steps, rotate it slightly, and keep metal objects away from the antenna. Run another scan once the detected signal is stable.
help.signalUnstable.title: Signal is unstable
help.writeVerifyFails.body: Keep the target transponder in the same position until the re-read verification completes. Failed verification stops the workflow; scan again before retrying.
help.writeVerifyFails.title: A write could not be verified
language.label: Language
language.title: Choose your language
overview.step3: Save a template or create a backup
overview.title: Overview
read.body: Create a verified template from a supported RFID or NFC chip.
read.scanningSubtitle: Status updates come from the Python operation manager.
read.title: Read chip
read.unstableBody: The signal is not stable enough for a safe template yet.
read.unstableHint: Move or rotate the chip slightly
settings.advancedUnavailable: Advanced tools are not enabled in this real app.
settings.showStartup: Show startup check when the app starts
status.antennaIdle: No antenna check in this session.
template.errorNeedsConfirmedScan: A template can only be saved after a confirmed second scan.
templates.empty: No matching templates found in storage.
templates.subtitle: Templates come from real local storage.
templates.title: Templates
write.comparisonIncompatible: Not compatible · target state does not match current chip
write.emptyComparison: The comparison could not be calculated for this combination.
write.emptyCurrent: Scan the current chip first. A backup is created automatically when the adapter can read the chip completely.
write.emptyTarget: Choose a template or backup as the target state.
write.errorNoCurrentChip: No real current chip has been read.
write.equivalence.partial: Partial update without full equivalence claim
write.equivalence.partialPending: Partial update planned - full equivalence not verified
write.equivalence.uidMismatch: UID does not match the template
write.equivalence.verifiedUidReference: Full data equivalence verified; UID is reference only
write.incompatibleTarget: This target state does not match the current chip.
write.matchesTarget: Current chip matches the target state.
write.blockReason.targetMissing: Area was not read on the current chip
write.blockReason.unsupportedPage: Adapter reports no tested write support for this page
write.pageTable.title: Page comparison
write.partialSuccessNotFull: Partial update succeeded - full equivalence not confirmed
